data.content: Plan review approved. Root cause confirmed: PoolAgentRow uses fixed w-[140px]/w-[220px] shrink-0 on the agent label container, which cannot accommodate multi-pill AgentDisplayLabel output. Proposed CSS grid or content-aware flex fix is sound and correctly scoped to settings-pools-section.tsx. AgentDisplayLabel itself needs no changes. Test strategy (layout contract + manual) is adequate. No invariant violations.
